Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 191 upvotes, 25 comments
  2. Xiaomi launches next-gen SU7 with 902 km range and Lidar, still undercuts Tesla 36 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 120 upvotes, 15 comments
  4. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 73 upvotes, 11 comments
  5. The Shape of Inequalities 85 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. Successes and Breakdowns in Everyday Non-Display Smart Glasses Use 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022) 61 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 281 upvotes, 86 comments
  9. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 170 upvotes, 53 comments
  10. EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in LLMs via Esoteric Languages 35 upvotes, 10 comments
  11. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 296 upvotes, 143 comments
  12. Tesla: Failure of the FSD's degradation detection system [pdf] 133 upvotes, 59 comments
  13. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 98 upvotes, 42 comments
  14. Afroman found not liable in defamation case 1063 upvotes, 601 comments
  15. The Need for an Independent AI Grid 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 61 upvotes, 26 comments
  17. Astral to Join OpenAI 1136 upvotes, 705 comments
  18. “Your frustration is the product” 366 upvotes, 224 comments
  19. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 100 upvotes, 52 comments
  20. Juggalo makeup blocks facial recognition technology (2019) 213 upvotes, 133 comments
  21. I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI 63 upvotes, 33 comments
  22. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 242 upvotes, 169 comments
  23. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 41 upvotes, 22 comments
  24. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce and shutting down next week 42 upvotes, 23 comments
  25. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 27 upvotes, 14 comments
  26. Anthropic takes legal action against OpenCode 317 upvotes, 265 comments
  27. Waymo Safety Impact 148 upvotes, 122 comments
  28. Connecticut and the 1 Kilometer Effect 33 upvotes, 24 comments
  29. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 369 upvotes, 394 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 212 upvotes, 331 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
